question: An IMS subsystem is being scaled on a multiprocessor CPC. Which actions align with Redbook IMS principles? [Hard-1]
option_1: Exploit sysplex to run multiple IMS subsystems against same databases
option_2: Use z/OS subsystem registration for failure detection and subsystem interaction
option_3: Use a control region with dependent address spaces
option_4: Eliminate message logs to reduce integrity overhead

option_1: Use z/OS subsystem registration for failure detection and subsystem interaction

option_3: Run IMS in multiple address spaces
option_4: Eliminate message logs to reduce integrity overhead

option_4: Treat physical storage layout as mandatory application-level concern
